# discord_member_role (Resource)

Assigns a role to a guild member. Removing the resource removes the role from the member.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `role_id` (String) ID of the role to assign.
- `server_id` (String) ID of the server (guild).
- `user_id` (String) ID of the member (user).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite ID of server_id:user_id:role_id.
